full_text:
Zhang Biao (Boda) 張表 (伯達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Biao (張表), styledBoda (伯達), was born in Shu commandery. Son of either Zhang Su or Zhang Song. Talented. Zhang Biao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
